description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic written in the margins of recto and on verso of a page of Rashi’s Talmud commentary (Ḥullin 118a–b). The commentary looks like it is written in the hand of Yosef b. Shemuel b. Seʿadya hand (or the hand of his brother Shelomo), late 12th century or early 13th. AA
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
